# symbolic

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/symbolic"
```

Package symbolic implements symbolic directions, a predictive technique that advances each natal planet and angle by a fixed rate per year of life.

Unlike secondary progressions \(which use actual ephemeris positions\), symbolic directions apply a mathematical formula:

```
Directed position = natal position + age x rate
```

Supported methods include One Degree per Year \(1.0/year\), Naibod Arc \(0.98556/year, the Sun's mean daily motion\), Profection Arc \(30/year\), and user\-defined custom rates.

CalcSymbolicDirections is the main entry point. It computes the natal chart, applies the arc to every planet and angle, and returns aspects between directed and natal positions.

<a name="DirectedAngle"></a>
## type [DirectedAngle](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L53-L60>)

DirectedAngle holds the directed position for an angle \(ASC/MC/DSC/IC\).

```go
type DirectedAngle struct {
    PointID      string  `json:"point_id"`
    NatalLon     float64 `json:"natal_longitude"`
    DirectedLon  float64 `json:"directed_longitude"`
    DirectedSign string  `json:"directed_sign"`
    DirectedDeg  float64 `json:"directed_sign_degree"`
    ArcApplied   float64 `json:"arc_applied"`
}
```

<a name="DirectionMethod"></a>
## type [DirectionMethod](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L13>)

DirectionMethod identifies the symbolic direction formula.

```go
type DirectionMethod string
```

<a name="MethodOneDegree"></a>

```go
const (
    // MethodOneDegree advances each position by 1.0 per year.
    MethodOneDegree DirectionMethod = "ONE_DEGREE"
    // MethodNaibod uses the Sun's mean daily motion (0.98556/year).
    MethodNaibod DirectionMethod = "NAIBOD"
    // MethodProfection advances each position by 30 per year.
    MethodProfection DirectionMethod = "PROFECTION"
    // MethodCustom uses the caller-supplied CustomRate.
    MethodCustom DirectionMethod = "CUSTOM"
)
```

<a name="DirectionMethod.Rate"></a>
### func \(DirectionMethod\) [Rate](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L29>)

```go
func (m DirectionMethod) Rate() float64
```

Rate returns the degrees\-per\-year for the method. For MethodCustom it returns the default 1.0; callers should use SymbolicInput.CustomRate instead.

<a name="SymbolicDirection"></a>
## type [SymbolicDirection](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L43-L50>)

SymbolicDirection holds the directed position for a single planet.

```go
type SymbolicDirection struct {
    PlanetID     models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    NatalLon     float64         `json:"natal_longitude"`
    DirectedLon  float64         `json:"directed_longitude"`
    DirectedSign string          `json:"directed_sign"`
    DirectedDeg  float64         `json:"directed_sign_degree"`
    ArcApplied   float64         `json:"arc_applied"`
}
```

<a name="SymbolicDirectionResult"></a>
## type [SymbolicDirectionResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L63-L70>)

SymbolicDirectionResult is the complete output of CalcSymbolicDirections.

```go
type SymbolicDirectionResult struct {
    Method     DirectionMethod     `json:"method"`
    Rate       float64             `json:"rate_per_year"`
    Age        float64             `json:"age"`
    Directions []SymbolicDirection `json:"directions"`
    Angles     []DirectedAngle     `json:"angles"`
    Aspects    []models.AspectInfo `json:"aspects"`
}
```

<a name="CalcSymbolicDirections"></a>
### func [CalcSymbolicDirections](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L97>)

```go
func CalcSymbolicDirections(input SymbolicInput) (*SymbolicDirectionResult, error)
```

CalcSymbolicDirections computes symbolic directions for the given input.

It calculates the natal chart, applies the arc \(age x rate\) to every planet and angle, and finds aspects between directed and natal positions.

<a name="SymbolicInput"></a>
## type [SymbolicInput](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/symbolic/symbolic.go#L73-L83>)

SymbolicInput configures a symbolic directions calculation.

```go
type SymbolicInput struct {
    NatalJD     float64
    GeoLat      float64
    GeoLon      float64
    Age         float64 // age in years
    Method      DirectionMethod
    CustomRate  float64 // only used when Method == MethodCustom
    Planets     []models.PlanetID
    OrbConfig   models.OrbConfig
    HouseSystem models.HouseSystem
}
```
